special_mechanics.name: Vehicle traversal
special_mechanics.description: Player can traverse the game world on foot or with vehicles including dinosaurs, boats, ships, and dragons

special_mechanics.name: Isometric perspective with diagonal control
special_mechanics.description: Game played from isometric perspective with diagonal control scheme; camera zooms closer when entering buildings

special_mechanics.name: Day-night cycle
special_mechanics.description: Game features day-night cycle affecting available tasks and quests

tier_notes: Tier 3 - RPG with isometric perspective. No platformer movement mechanics or physics parameters documented. Wikipedia source focuses on gameplay loop, story, and development rather than technical movement parameters.
